cards.title: Decomposability and Partitioning
cards.governance_note: Define what can be divided, how work is partitioned, and whether load balance is measured.

cards.title: Communication and Coordination
cards.governance_note: Document communication, synchronization, data movement, consistency, and coordination overhead.

cards.title: Failure, Cost, and Governance
cards.governance_note: Test fault tolerance, retries, queue overload, cost growth, and human review capacity.
